name: Ourodex
description_short: A non-custodial DeFi platform on Cardano — expanding to Midnight — built as a growing suite of products sharing one foundation: best-execution trading with fees shown up front.
description_long:
Ourodex is a decentralized finance (DeFi) platform built on Cardano, with expansion underway to Midnight. Rather than a single app, Ourodex is a growing suite of products that all share one foundation: non-custodial trading with best execution and fees shown up front, no hidden costs.

Current products include **Aggregator**, a best-execution swap router across Cardano DEXs, and **Outcomes**, an on-chain pari-mutuel prediction market — pick Yes/No on a question, stake ADA, and winners split the losing side's pool automatically on-chain, with no house and no fixed odds. More products are being added as the suite grows.

products.name: Aggregator
products.description: Best-execution swap aggregator routing trades across Cardano DEXs.

products.name: Outcomes
products.description: On-chain pari-mutuel prediction markets — pick Yes/No, stake ADA, win a share of the losing pool.

assets.description: Ourodex Finance native token on Cardano. Total minted supply: 1,000,000,000.

policy.description: Minting policy for the OURO token (single mint, fixed supply, CIP-25 metadata).
